documentation.text: @notice Tune weights post-deploy — must always sum to SCORE_RANGE
@notice Returns raw score 300–850 and tier label
@notice Full score breakdown — useful for frontend dashboard
@notice Tier label only — cheaper call for simple UI checks
@notice Score as a percentage 0–100 — useful for progress bars

@dev How long the user has been a depositor
      Linear scale: 0 days = 0pts, 365 days = weightTenure pts

@dev Lifetime QUSDC deposited — rewards committed capital
      Capped at 10,000 QUSDC so small users can still score well

@dev Number of bets placed — rewards participation
      Capped at 50 bets
